description:
You are a planetary mission planner at the Mars Exploration Program. Estimate the data return capacity for the Perseverance rover in Jezero Crater over a 7-day period starting 01 Jan 2026 12:00:00.000 UTC using the MRO and MAVEN orbiters. Using the mission specifications provided in ~/Desktop/mars_relay_spec.txt, create and run a GMAT simulation to calculate the total visibility minutes for each orbiter with a 10-degree minimum elevation constraint. Save the GMAT script to ~/GMAT_output/mars_relay_analysis.script and write the results to ~/GMAT_output/relay_summary.txt using the following format:
mro_total_minutes: <value>
maven_total_minutes: <value>
primary_relay: <MRO or MAVEN>

Login: username=ga, password=password123
